backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for Scrambly, including user profiles, ban/warn/moderation logic, friend requests, appeal handling, content moderation with banned keywords, and blob storage via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two 'Remember Me' checkbox features to their implementing files (AuthGate.tsx, Layout.tsx) with associated component dependencies and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Scrambly app that mounts the React root div, loads the main TSX module, and sets a Sonic Mania-themed favicon and apple-touch-icon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, search, videos, games, community, friends, settings, parental, admin, appeal, age-matcher, moderation) wrapped in AuthGate and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccountLockedMes: Displays a full-screen locked account message explaining why the account was locked and providing a logout button to allow the user to create a new account.
UI toggle component that reads and updates the ad blocker enabled state via the useAdBlocker hook, displaying a shield icon and status label.
frontend/src/components/AgeVerificationM: Modal component that collects a user's name and birth year, calls the age verification mutation, and displays access-denied or success states based on the result.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps the app to enforce Internet Identity authentication, profile onboarding, account lock checks, and usage timer expiry before rendering children.
frontend/src/components/CameraCaptureSte: Onboarding step that activates the device camera, captures a photo for liveness verification, immediately discards it, and advances the flow on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Fetches and renders a list of community posts with author, timestamp, and message, showing skeletons while loading and empty/error states as needed.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostFor: Form for submitting community posts with client-side banned-keyword filtering and error handling for banned/locked accounts.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCallBut: Pulsing SOS button that shows a confirmation dialog before initiating a tel:911 call via window.location.
frontend/src/components/ExternalSearchBu: Renders Google and DuckDuckGo search buttons for a given query, playing a Robotnik laugh sound and opening the search URL in a new tab on click.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend list item by fetching the friend's profile via their Principal, showing a skeleton loader while loading and displaying their name/initials with an online indicator.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays an incoming friend request with the requester's profile info and accept/decline buttons, using the useRespondToFriendRequest mutation to handle responses.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: A slide-up panel (mobile) or modal (desktop) showing the user's friends list and pending friend requests, with a 1000-friend limit warning and skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/components/KidModeWrapper.t: A wrapper component that conditionally renders children based on whether the user's profile indicates kid mode (age ≤ 12), supporting hide-in-kid-mode and kid-only content variants.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout providing a sticky header with navigation links, a mobile bottom nav, admin-only link for a specific username, and a sign-out flow with a confirmation dialog when Remember Me is enabled.
frontend/src/components/ModeratorWelcome: Displays a dismissible welcome banner for moderators at the top of the page, using sessionStorage to persist the dismissed state within a session.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingFlow.t: Multi-step onboarding flow that sequences a camera capture step followed by an age verification modal, using sessionStorage to skip the camera step if already completed this session.
frontend/src/components/ParentalFaceScan: A modal component that walks parents through a face scan verification flow (intro, countdown, capture, verify) using the device camera, then immediately discards the captured photo without storing it.
frontend/src/components/PINEntryModal.ts: A dialog modal for parental controls that allows parents to enter or change a PIN stored in localStorage, with a default PIN of 1234 and validation for new PIN setup.
A full-screen overlay displayed when a user is banned from searching, showing ban details, an optional appeal button, and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input form with a clear button and submit handler that calls an onSearch callback with the trimmed query.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Renders a grid of search result cards for Sonic knowledge entries and YouTube channel entries, with loading skeletons, empty-state messaging, and type-specific icons and colors.
frontend/src/components/SearchWarningNot: A dismissible warning banner that displays the user's current search warning count, remaining warnings before a ban, and a visual pip indicator.
frontend/src/components/UsageTimerLockou: A full-screen lockout screen shown when a child's daily screen time limit is reached, prompting them to log out.
frontend/src/data/knucklesContent.ts: Static dataset of Sonic knowledge entries focused on Knuckles, including character bios, matchups, lore, and super forms.
frontend/src/data/knucklesVideos.ts: Static list of YouTube video entries related to Knuckles, each tagged with an ID, title, category, and kid-safe flag.
frontend/src/data/sonicAbilities.ts: Static dataset defining Sonic character abilities (currently Amy's Piko Piko Hammer) along with alias keywords for search matching.
frontend/src/data/sonicBoomVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports an array of Sonic Boom episode video entries (Seasons 1+) with YouTube IDs, categories, and kid-friendly flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicCharacters.ts: Exports an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects describing major Sonic franchise characters (e.g., Sonic, Shadow, Tails, Eggman) with descriptions and highlights.
frontend/src/data/sonicExeVsMetalSonicVi: Exports a small array of VideoEntry objects for Sonic.EXE vs Metal Sonic themed YouTube videos, all marked as kid-friendly.
frontend/src/data/sonicItems.ts: Exports an array of SonicKnowledgeEntry objects describing notable Sonic franchise items, specifically the Chaos Emerald and Chili Dog.
frontend/src/data/sonicLore.ts: Defines a SonicLoreEntry interface and exports an array of lore entries covering major Sonic game storylines from 1991 onward, including key characters and notable events per game.
frontend/src/data/sonicPrimeVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports an array of Sonic Prime episode video entries across three seasons with placeholder YouTube IDs and kid-friendly flags.
frontend/src/data/sonicSaysVideos.ts: Defines a VideoEntry interface and exports 15 kid-friendly 'Sonic Says' public service announcement video entries with placeholder YouTube IDs.
frontend/src/data/sonicVsMetalSonicVideo: Exports an array of VideoEntry objects for Sonic vs Metal Sonic themed YouTube videos, covering battles, boss fights, and speed comparisons.
frontend/src/data/speedrunVideos.ts: Defines a list of Sonic speedrun YouTube video entries (id, title, category, kidFriendly) across four categories: Sonic 1, 2, 3, and Mania, along with exported category constants and types.
frontend/src/data/youtubeChannels.ts: Defines a YouTubeChannelEntry interface and exports a single hardcoded YouTube channel entry for 'Teardropbfb' with metadata like description, URL, and aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdBlocker.ts: Custom hook that manages an ad-blocker toggle state, persisting the enabled/disabled value to localStorage with a default of enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including profile management, age verification, admin checks, warnings, usage time, and friends/ideas features via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRobotnikLaugh.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Dr. Robotnik-style villain laugh sound using the Web Audio API with sawtooth oscillators, requiring no external audio assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchModerator.ts: Custom hook that moderates search queries by detecting inappropriate terms, issuing warnings, banning users after a threshold, and supporting a one-time appeal, with state persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useUsageTimer.ts: Custom hook that manages a countdown timer based on a user profile's remaining usage time, updating every second and exposing expiration state and a time formatter.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a Sonic-themed design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only panel restricted to a specific username that provides UI for banning, warning, unbanning users, and promoting users to moderator by entering their principal IDs.
frontend/src/pages/AgeMatcher.tsx: Page that displays the current user's profile and allows them to find other Sonic fans born in the same year, with age-matched friend discovery currently gated behind an admin flag.
frontend/src/pages/AppealPage.tsx: Ban appeal submission page that allows a banned user to submit a one-time text appeal, validates origin and character limits, and processes the appeal to clear the ban via a custom hook.
frontend/src/pages/BlockBlastGame.tsx: A canvas-based Tetris-style block blast game with piece movement, rotation, line clearing, score tracking, and a high score stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Renders the community page with a post form and feed, showing a kid-mode block for users under 13 and displaying warnings/guidelines for eligible users.
frontend/src/pages/FriendsModePage.tsx: Manages the Friends Mode feature, allowing users to submit a birthdate-based access request and view/manage friends and friend requests once approved.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of available Sonic-themed mini games (Block Blast and Sonic Runner) with links to play them, plus a button to browse external games.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a hero section and navigation cards linking to Search, Videos, Games, Community, and Friends sections.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: Implements a Sonic-themed memory card matching game with a shuffle mechanic, move counter, timer, and win detection.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationDashboard.t: Admin-only dashboard for moderating community posts, issuing user warnings, reviewing Friends Mode requests, and managing submitted ideas.
frontend/src/pages/ParentalDashboard.tsx: A parental controls dashboard that requires face scan and PIN verification before granting access, allowing parents to configure usage timers, content restrictions, and chat visibility settings stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/RingCollectorGame.tsx: A canvas-based mini-game where the player moves horizontally to collect falling rings while avoiding obstacles, with score tracking and a localStorage high score.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: A search page for Sonic-themed content that queries local knowledge entries and a backend, enforces parental time limits, moderates queries for warnings/bans, and renders video or knowledge results.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: A settings page where users can update their profile, set/verify a password, submit feature ideas, and apply to become a moderator, with age-based kid mode detection.
frontend/src/pages/SonicDodgeGame.tsx: A canvas-based dodge game where the player controls a Sonic character to avoid homing obstacles that increase in speed over time, with high score persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicJumpGame.tsx: A canvas-based platformer mini-game where the player jumps between scrolling platforms, tracking score and high score stored in localStorage. Handles keyboard and touch input for jumping, with game over detection when the player falls off screen.
frontend/src/pages/SonicRunnerGame.tsx: A Sonic-themed endless runner canvas game featuring a running character that must jump over obstacles and collect rings, with increasing speed and high score persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicTriviaGame.tsx: A multiple-choice trivia quiz game with 22 Sonic the Hedgehog questions, tracking correct answers and displaying a final score summary with a restart option.
frontend/src/pages/SpinDashChallengeGame: A timing-based mini-game where the player holds a button to charge a meter and releases it within a randomized target zone across 8 rounds, with high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/VideosPage.tsx: A page displaying a filterable grid of embedded YouTube Sonic speedrun videos, organized by game category (Sonic 1, 2, 3, Mania) with optional kid-friendly filtering.
frontend/src/pages/WhackAChaoGame.tsx: A 30-second Whack-a-Mole style mini-game using a 3x3 grid where players click randomly appearing Chao characters to score points, with high score persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Sonic-themed colors, fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Scrambly' tracking existing features (Remember Me checkbox and session persistence) and a pending action request to implement the Remember Me login flow.
